vpn_key SOVD Token Service
Active
1 tune Token Configurations
playlist_add Quick Presets (Optional)
settings Configuration Details
expand_more
badge JWT Standard Claims
security Authorization Claims
directions_car Authorization Details
2 vpn_key Generate Token
3 security Generated JWT Token (Raw)
info Use this token in Authorization headers or paste into other applications. Click token or copy button to copy.
4 description Decoded JWT Payload (Formatted)
